Exchanger selector scored alternatives from gross unit duties.
context: Heat-exchanger family selection from the process energy envelope.

criteria.name: Technical feasibility
criteria.justification: Selected exchanger must handle the identified duty and service.

criteria.name: Heat-management fit
criteria.justification: Thermal service and fouling tendency guide exchanger choice.

criteria.name: Operability
criteria.justification: Maintainability and controllability matter at feasibility stage.

criteria.name: Economics
criteria.justification: Exchanger choice affects both CAPEX and maintenance burden.
